description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in work attire, featuring a flat cap, long-sleeved shirt, denim overalls, and sturdy boots. The figure has a slightly rounded build and is depicted with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The facial features are simplified, with a prominent nose and ears, and the figure has no visible facial hair. The overalls have visible straps and a front bib, while the boots are high and robust, suitable for outdoor or manual labor. The overall appearance suggests a working-class individual, possibly a farmer or laborer, commonly seen in urban or rural environments. The surface of the figure is matte and lacks intricate texturing, giving it a smooth, cartoon-like finish.
description: A stylized adult male in work attire with a flat cap, overalls, and boots, depicted in a T-pose. The figure has a rounded build and simplified facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and outstretched arms, highlighting the overalls and cap.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the profile of the face, the rounded belly, and the thickness of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cap, overalls, and boots, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the overalls.
attribute_clothing_type: work overalls with a long-sleeved shirt and flat cap
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short hair covered by a cap
